  News Release – DOH Alerts Public About Recall of Pedigree High Protein Wet Dog
  Food Due to Potential Presence of Foreign Materials - Office of the Governor
  Josh Green (.gov)

summary: >-
  Mars Petcare US, Inc. recalled two lots of PEDIGREE Can High Protein Chopped
  Chicken & Duck Flavor wet dog food (13.2 oz) after the product potentially
  contained metal and plastic pieces. The lots were scheduled for destruction
  but were diverted and improperly sold by a third-party vendor, so the Hawai‘i
  Department of Health cannot confirm whether the product reached the state. Dog
  owners should check the bottom of cans for lot codes 613C3KKCFC and 613C1KKCFC
  and stop feeding the recalled product. Hard or sharp objects may cause
  choking, lacerations, or gastrointestinal blockages. Consumers should contact
  their veterinarian if their dog ate the food and call PEDIGREE Consumer Care
  at 1-800-525-5273 for a replacement.
relatedSlugs: {}

---
Mars Petcare US, Inc. recalled two lots of PEDIGREE Can High Protein Chopped Chicken & Duck Flavor wet dog food (13.2 oz) after the product potentially contained metal and plastic pieces. The lots were scheduled for destruction but were diverted and improperly sold by a third-party vendor, so the Hawai‘i Department of Health cannot confirm whether the product reached the state. Dog owners should check the bottom of cans for lot codes 613C3KKCFC and 613C1KKCFC and stop feeding the recalled product. Hard or sharp objects may cause choking, lacerations, or gastrointestinal blockages. Consumers should contact their veterinarian if their dog ate the food and call PEDIGREE Consumer Care at 1-800-525-5273 for a replacement.

[Read the full report on Google News →](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi-?oc=5)
